title: Act II — Kitchen, Bath, Stairs

references.@Image3: Chunk 2 storyboard grid — room layouts and compositions

prompt:
@Image1's character as the subject, same gold wrap dress throughout. Scene and color grade reference @Image2. Shot sequence reference @Image3. Prestige commercial polish, deadpan surreal, hard cuts between rooms, 13 seconds.

0–4s: Wide marble kitchen, copper pots cream cabinetry, young chef kneels weeping over single asparagus spear on cutting board, actress foreground stirs tea in china cup talks to camera never looks at chef, cut to close-up deadpan face gold hoops blurred weeping chef behind, quiet kitchen faint sob tea spoon clink.

4–8s: Wide gilt vanity bathroom crystal chandelier in mirror, actress seated reapplies red lipstick, solicitor in grey suit stands in hall doorway behind on phone call she does not acknowledge, mirror reflection medium then tight vanity close-up deadpan eyes, muffled phone distant dialogue uninterrupted.

8–13s: Wide top of grand curved staircase burgundy walls oil portraits, actress descends gold heels, Black butler follows carrying white marble classical bust wearing gold Venetian carnival mask on bust face, she keeps talking to camera never looks back, medium track down low angle on landing, heel clicks on marble.

Voice: posh British monotone, no inflection, fast continuous.

Dialogue: My housekeeper thinks dust is a suggestion. I fired a chef for emoting at asparagus. He wept. I offered a tissue. It was linen. Wrong weight. In the bath I told my ex's solicitor I don't do group chats. He does. That's why he's an ex's solicitor. On the stairs I remembered I still owe Venice an apology. I won't pay it. Venice was smug.

style.look: same gold wrap dress throughout, prestige commercial polish
style.mood: deadpan, surreal background details treated as normal
style.pacing: hard cuts between rooms every 3–4 seconds
